goal: Suggest preprocessing and feature-engineering actions for predicting applicant repayment difficulty on Home Credit loan data under the AUC evaluation metric.

task_characteristics.analysis_notes: Large multi-table credit-risk classification task centered on current loan applications and six linked history tables keyed through SK_ID_CURR, SK_ID_PREV, and SK_ID_BUREAU. The largest benchmark-relevant raw table is bureau_balance.csv with 27,299,925 monthly bureau-history rows, which places the task in the xlarge bucket. The benchmark-relevant case-insensitive raw-column union is 195 columns across the application, bureau, previous-application, POS/cash, credit-card, and installment tables, so the task is materially wider than the medium bucket cutoff. The curated Home Credit golden set currently contains 21 preprocessing actions, making this a high-complexity preprocessing benchmark with heavy relational aggregation, categorical handling, missing-value treatment, and ratio-feature construction.

overview.title: Home Credit Default Risk
overview.summary: Can you predict how capable each applicant is of repaying a loan?
overview.raw_text: Home Credit is a consumer-finance provider focused on extending credit to applicants with limited formal credit histories. This competition asks participants to estimate whether a current applicant will have repayment difficulties so the lender can broaden access while controlling default risk. The benchmark-relevant data combines the main application table with six linked history tables covering external bureau records, monthly bureau balances, prior Home Credit applications, POS and cash-loan balances, credit-card balances, and installment-payment history. Submissions predict TARGET for each SK_ID_CURR and are evaluated with area under the ROC curve.

dataset_description.summary: The raw competition bundle contains 10 CSV files totaling 2,684,261,617 bytes. The main supervised table is application_train.csv with 307,511 labeled loan applications and 122 columns, paired with application_test.csv containing 48,744 unlabeled applications and 121 columns. Six auxiliary relational tables add historical credit context, with bureau_balance.csv alone contributing 27,299,925 monthly rows. Across the benchmark-relevant train, test, and lookup tables, the case-insensitive raw-column union is 195 columns tied together through SK_ID_CURR, SK_ID_PREV, and SK_ID_BUREAU. A separate HomeCredit_columns_description.csv file documents 219 named fields across the competition tables.
dataset_description.raw_text: Home Credit Default Risk is organized around one current-application entity keyed by SK_ID_CURR plus multiple one-to-many history tables. application_train.csv provides the supervised target TARGET, while application_test.csv mirrors the same schema without labels for submission-time scoring. bureau.csv and bureau_balance.csv capture prior external-credit records and their month-level status histories. previous_application.csv records earlier Home Credit applications, while POS_CASH_balance.csv, credit_card_balance.csv, and installments_payments.csv provide monthly or payment-level histories for those prior relationships. This layout makes the task benchmark-relevant as a relational aggregation problem rather than a flat single-table classification task: strong preprocessing pipelines must align foreign keys, summarize repeated histories to the customer level, manage substantial missingness, and encode mixed numeric, categorical, boolean, and temporal-offset fields before modeling.

features.name: SK_ID_CURR
features.description: ID of loan in our sample

features.name: TARGET
features.description: Target variable (1 - client with payment difficulties: he/she had late payment more than X days on at least one of the first Y installments of the loan in our sample, 0 - all other cases)

features.name: NAME_CONTRACT_TYPE
features.description: Identification if loan is cash or revolving

features.name: CODE_GENDER
features.description: Gender of the client

features.name: FLAG_OWN_CAR
features.description: Flag if the client owns a car

features.name: FLAG_OWN_REALTY
features.description: Flag if client owns a house or flat

features.name: CNT_CHILDREN
features.description: Number of children the client has

features.name: AMT_INCOME_TOTAL
features.description: Income of the client

features.name: AMT_CREDIT
features.description: Credit amount of the loan

features.name: AMT_ANNUITY
features.description: Loan annuity

features.name: AMT_GOODS_PRICE
features.description: For consumer loans it is the price of the goods for which the loan is given

features.name: NAME_TYPE_SUITE
features.description: Who was accompanying client when he was applying for the loan

features.name: NAME_INCOME_TYPE
features.description: Clients income type (businessman, working, maternity leave,...)

features.name: NAME_EDUCATION_TYPE

features.name: NAME_FAMILY_STATUS

features.name: NAME_HOUSING_TYPE
features.description: What is the housing situation of the client (renting, living with parents, ...)

features.name: REGION_POPULATION_RELATIVE
features.description: Normalized population of region where client lives (higher number means the client lives in more populated region) Special: normalized

features.name: DAYS_BIRTH
features.description: Client's age in days at the time of application Special: time only relative to the application

features.name: DAYS_EMPLOYED
features.description: How many days before the application the person started current employment Special: time only relative to the application

features.name: DAYS_REGISTRATION
features.description: How many days before the application did client change his registration Special: time only relative to the application

features.name: DAYS_ID_PUBLISH
features.description: How many days before the application did client change the identity document with which he applied for the loan Special: time only relative to the application

features.name: OWN_CAR_AGE
features.description: Age of client's car

features.name: FLAG_MOBIL
features.description: Did client provide mobile phone (1=YES, 0=NO)

features.name: FLAG_EMP_PHONE
features.description: Did client provide work phone (1=YES, 0=NO)

features.name: FLAG_WORK_PHONE

features.name: FLAG_EMAIL

features.name: OCCUPATION_TYPE
features.description: What kind of occupation does the client have

features.name: CNT_FAM_MEMBERS
features.description: How many family members does client have

features.name: REGION_RATING_CLIENT
features.description: Our rating of the region where client lives (1,2,3)

features.name: REGION_RATING_CLIENT_W_CITY
features.description: Our rating of the region where client lives with taking city into account (1,2,3)

features.name: WEEKDAY_APPR_PROCESS_START
features.description: On which day of the week did the client apply for the loan

features.name: HOUR_APPR_PROCESS_START
features.description: Approximately at what hour did the client apply for the loan Special: rounded

features.name: REG_REGION_NOT_LIVE_REGION

features.description: Flag if client's permanent address does not match work address (1=different, 0=same, at region level)

features.description: Flag if client's contact address does not match work address (1=different, 0=same, at region level)

features.description: Number of enquiries to Credit Bureau about the client one hour before application

features.name: SK_ID_CURR
features.description: ID of loan in our sample - one loan in our sample can have 0,1,2 or more related previous credits in credit bureau Special: hashed

features.name: SK_BUREAU_ID
features.description: Recoded ID of previous Credit Bureau credit related to our loan (unique coding for each loan application) Special: hashed

features.name: CREDIT_ACTIVE
features.description: Status of the Credit Bureau (CB) reported credits

features.name: CREDIT_CURRENCY
features.description: Recoded currency of the Credit Bureau credit Special: recoded

features.name: DAYS_CREDIT
features.description: How many days before current application did client apply for Credit Bureau credit Special: time only relative to the application

features.name: CREDIT_DAY_OVERDUE
features.description: Number of days past due on CB credit at the time of application for related loan in our sample

features.name: DAYS_CREDIT_ENDDATE
features.description: Remaining duration of CB credit (in days) at the time of application in Home Credit Special: time only relative to the application

features.name: DAYS_ENDDATE_FACT
features.description: Days since CB credit ended at the time of application in Home Credit (only for closed credit) Special: time only relative to the application

features.name: AMT_CREDIT_MAX_OVERDUE
features.description: Maximal amount overdue on the Credit Bureau credit so far (at application date of loan in our sample)

features.name: CNT_CREDIT_PROLONG
features.description: How many times was the Credit Bureau credit prolonged

features.name: AMT_CREDIT_SUM
features.description: Current credit amount for the Credit Bureau credit

features.name: AMT_CREDIT_SUM_DEBT
features.description: Current debt on Credit Bureau credit

features.name: AMT_CREDIT_SUM_LIMIT
features.description: Current credit limit of credit card reported in Credit Bureau

features.name: AMT_CREDIT_SUM_OVERDUE
features.description: Current amount overdue on Credit Bureau credit

features.name: CREDIT_TYPE
features.description: Type of Credit Bureau credit (Car, cash,...)

features.name: DAYS_CREDIT_UPDATE
features.description: How many days before loan application did last information about the Credit Bureau credit come Special: time only relative to the application

features.name: AMT_ANNUITY
features.description: Annuity of the Credit Bureau credit

features.name: SK_BUREAU_ID
features.description: Recoded ID of Credit Bureau credit (unique coding for each application) - use this to join to CREDIT_BUREAU table Special: hashed

features.name: MONTHS_BALANCE
features.description: Month of balance relative to application date (-1 means the freshest balance date) Special: time only relative to the application

features.name: STATUS
features.description: Status of Credit Bureau loan during the month (active, closed, DPD0-30,... [C means closed, X means status unknown, 0 means no DPD, 1 means maximal did during month between 1-30, 2 means DPD 31-60,... 5 means DPD 120+ or sold or written off ] )

features.name: SK_ID_PREV
features.description: ID of previous credit in Home Credit related to loan in our sample. (One loan in our sample can have 0,1,2 or more previous loans in Home Credit)

features.name: SK_ID_CURR
features.description: ID of loan in our sample

features.name: MONTHS_BALANCE
features.description: Month of balance relative to application date (-1 means the information to the freshest monthly snapshot, 0 means the information at application - often it will be the same as -1 as many banks are not updating the information to Credit Bureau regularly ) Special: time only relative to the application

features.name: CNT_INSTALMENT
features.description: Term of previous credit (can change over time)

features.name: CNT_INSTALMENT_FUTURE
features.description: Installments left to pay on the previous credit

features.name: NAME_CONTRACT_STATUS
features.description: Contract status during the month

features.name: SK_DPD
features.description: DPD (days past due) during the month of previous credit

features.name: SK_DPD_DEF
features.description: DPD during the month with tolerance (debts with low loan amounts are ignored) of the previous credit

features.name: SK_ID_PREV
features.description: ID of previous credit in Home credit related to loan in our sample. (One loan in our sample can have 0,1,2 or more previous loans in Home Credit) Special: hashed

features.name: SK_ID_CURR
features.description: ID of loan in our sample Special: hashed

features.name: MONTHS_BALANCE
features.description: Month of balance relative to application date (-1 means the freshest balance date) Special: time only relative to the application

features.name: AMT_BALANCE
features.description: Balance during the month of previous credit

features.name: AMT_CREDIT_LIMIT_ACTUAL
features.description: Credit card limit during the month of the previous credit

features.name: AMT_DRAWINGS_ATM_CURRENT
features.description: Amount drawing at ATM during the month of the previous credit

features.name: AMT_DRAWINGS_CURRENT
features.description: Amount drawing during the month of the previous credit

features.name: AMT_DRAWINGS_OTHER_CURRENT
features.description: Amount of other drawings during the month of the previous credit

features.name: AMT_DRAWINGS_POS_CURRENT
features.description: Amount drawing or buying goods during the month of the previous credit

features.name: AMT_INST_MIN_REGULARITY
features.description: Minimal installment for this month of the previous credit

features.name: AMT_PAYMENT_CURRENT
features.description: How much did the client pay during the month on the previous credit

features.name: AMT_PAYMENT_TOTAL_CURRENT
features.description: How much did the client pay during the month in total on the previous credit

features.name: AMT_RECEIVABLE_PRINCIPAL
features.description: Amount receivable for principal on the previous credit

features.name: AMT_RECIVABLE
features.description: Amount receivable on the previous credit

features.name: AMT_TOTAL_RECEIVABLE
features.description: Total amount receivable on the previous credit

features.name: CNT_DRAWINGS_ATM_CURRENT
features.description: Number of drawings at ATM during this month on the previous credit

features.name: CNT_DRAWINGS_CURRENT
features.description: Number of drawings during this month on the previous credit

features.name: CNT_DRAWINGS_OTHER_CURRENT
features.description: Number of other drawings during this month on the previous credit

features.name: CNT_DRAWINGS_POS_CURRENT
features.description: Number of drawings for goods during this month on the previous credit

features.name: CNT_INSTALMENT_MATURE_CUM
features.description: Number of paid installments on the previous credit

features.name: NAME_CONTRACT_STATUS
features.description: Contract status (active signed,...) on the previous credit

features.name: SK_DPD
features.description: DPD (Days past due) during the month on the previous credit

features.name: SK_DPD_DEF
features.description: DPD (Days past due) during the month with tolerance (debts with low loan amounts are ignored) of the previous credit

features.name: SK_ID_PREV
features.description: ID of previous credit in Home credit related to loan in our sample. (One loan in our sample can have 0,1,2 or more previous loan applications in Home Credit, previous application could, but not necessarily have to lead to credit) Special: hashed

features.name: SK_ID_CURR
features.description: ID of loan in our sample Special: hashed

features.name: NAME_CONTRACT_TYPE
features.description: Contract product type (Cash loan, consumer loan [POS] ,...) of the previous application

features.name: AMT_ANNUITY
features.description: Annuity of previous application

features.name: AMT_APPLICATION
features.description: For how much credit did client ask on the previous application

features.name: AMT_CREDIT
features.description: Final credit amount on the previous application. This differs from AMT_APPLICATION in a way that the AMT_APPLICATION is the amount for which the client initially applied for, but during our approval process he could have received different amount - AMT_CREDIT

features.name: AMT_DOWN_PAYMENT
features.description: Down payment on the previous application

features.name: AMT_GOODS_PRICE
features.description: Goods price of good that client asked for (if applicable) on the previous application

features.name: WEEKDAY_APPR_PROCESS_START
features.description: On which day of the week did the client apply for previous application

features.name: HOUR_APPR_PROCESS_START
features.description: Approximately at what day hour did the client apply for the previous application Special: rounded

features.name: FLAG_LAST_APPL_PER_CONTRACT
features.description: Flag if it was last application for the previous contract. Sometimes by mistake of client or our clerk there could be more applications for one single contract

features.name: NFLAG_LAST_APPL_IN_DAY
features.description: Flag if the application was the last application per day of the client. Sometimes clients apply for more applications a day. Rarely it could also be error in our system that one application is in the database twice

features.name: NFLAG_MICRO_CASH
features.description: Flag Micro finance loan

features.name: RATE_DOWN_PAYMENT
features.description: Down payment rate normalized on previous credit Special: normalized

features.name: RATE_INTEREST_PRIMARY
features.description: Interest rate normalized on previous credit Special: normalized

features.name: RATE_INTEREST_PRIVILEGED
features.description: Interest rate normalized on previous credit Special: normalized

features.name: NAME_CASH_LOAN_PURPOSE
features.description: Purpose of the cash loan

features.name: NAME_CONTRACT_STATUS
features.description: Contract status (approved, cancelled, ...) of previous application

features.name: DAYS_DECISION
features.description: Relative to current application when was the decision about previous application made Special: time only relative to the application

features.name: NAME_PAYMENT_TYPE
features.description: Payment method that client chose to pay for the previous application

features.name: CODE_REJECT_REASON
features.description: Why was the previous application rejected

features.name: NAME_TYPE_SUITE
features.description: Who accompanied client when applying for the previous application

features.name: NAME_CLIENT_TYPE
features.description: Was the client old or new client when applying for the previous application

features.name: NAME_GOODS_CATEGORY
features.description: What kind of goods did the client apply for in the previous application

features.name: NAME_PORTFOLIO
features.description: Was the previous application for CASH, POS, CAR, ...

features.name: NAME_PRODUCT_TYPE
features.description: Was the previous application x-sell o walk-in

features.name: CHANNEL_TYPE
features.description: Through which channel we acquired the client on the previous application

features.name: SELLERPLACE_AREA
features.description: Selling area of seller place of the previous application

features.name: NAME_SELLER_INDUSTRY
features.description: The industry of the seller

features.name: CNT_PAYMENT
features.description: Term of previous credit at application of the previous application

features.name: NAME_YIELD_GROUP
features.description: Grouped interest rate into small medium and high of the previous application Special: grouped

features.name: PRODUCT_COMBINATION
features.description: Detailed product combination of the previous application

features.name: DAYS_FIRST_DRAWING
features.description: Relative to application date of current application when was the first disbursement of the previous application Special: time only relative to the application

features.name: DAYS_FIRST_DUE
features.description: Relative to application date of current application when was the first due supposed to be of the previous application Special: time only relative to the application

features.name: DAYS_LAST_DUE_1ST_VERSION
features.description: Relative to application date of current application when was the first due of the previous application Special: time only relative to the application

features.name: DAYS_LAST_DUE
features.description: Relative to application date of current application when was the last due date of the previous application Special: time only relative to the application

features.name: DAYS_TERMINATION
features.description: Relative to application date of current application when was the expected termination of the previous application Special: time only relative to the application

features.name: NFLAG_INSURED_ON_APPROVAL
features.description: Did the client requested insurance during the previous application

features.name: SK_ID_PREV
features.description: ID of previous credit in Home credit related to loan in our sample. (One loan in our sample can have 0,1,2 or more previous loans in Home Credit) Special: hashed

features.name: SK_ID_CURR
features.description: ID of loan in our sample Special: hashed

features.name: NUM_INSTALMENT_VERSION
features.description: Version of installment calendar (0 is for credit card) of previous credit. Change of installment version from month to month signifies that some parameter of payment calendar has changed

features.name: NUM_INSTALMENT_NUMBER
features.description: On which installment we observe payment

features.name: DAYS_INSTALMENT
features.description: When the installment of previous credit was supposed to be paid (relative to application date of current loan) Special: time only relative to the application

features.name: DAYS_ENTRY_PAYMENT
features.description: When was the installments of previous credit paid actually (relative to application date of current loan) Special: time only relative to the application

features.name: AMT_INSTALMENT
features.description: What was the prescribed installment amount of previous credit on this installment

features.name: AMT_PAYMENT
features.description: What the client actually paid on previous credit on this installment
